I'll start by reading the file to understand its current state.

Now let me reason through each fix:

### Fix 1: Button.variant type change
The type changed from `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'` to `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'`. The only difference is the **addition** of `'stateful'`. The values used in this file are:
- Line 38: `ButtonVariant.link` — still valid ✓
- Line 46: `ButtonVariant.primary` — still valid ✓
- Line 56: `ButtonVariant.secondary` — still valid ✓

All existing values are still in the new type. **No code changes needed** for Fix 1.

### Fix 2: EmptyState Family Migration
The file uses `EmptyStateHeader` and `EmptyStateIcon` which are deprecated in PF v6. In v6, `EmptyState` absorbs the props that were on `EmptyStateHeader` (`headingLevel`, `titleText`, `icon`). `EmptyStateIcon` is also removed — the `icon` prop on `EmptyState` takes a `ReactNode` directly.

Looking at the current code (lines 29-34):
```jsx
<EmptyState variant={EmptyStateVariant.lg}>
  <EmptyStateHeader
    headingLevel="h4"
    icon={<EmptyStateIcon icon={VirtualMachineIcon} />}
    titleText={<>{t('No VirtualMachinesInstances found')}</>}
  />
```

This needs to become:
```jsx
<EmptyState variant={EmptyStateVariant.lg} headingLevel="h4" icon={VirtualMachineIcon} titleText={<>{t('No VirtualMachinesInstances found')}</>}>
```

The `EmptyStateHeader` and `EmptyStateIcon` components should be removed, and their props moved to `EmptyState`. Also need to remove `EmptyStateHeader` and `EmptyStateIcon` from imports.

**No change needed.** The type change only **added** `'stateful'` to the union. All values used in the file (`ButtonVariant.link`, `ButtonVariant.primary`, `ButtonVariant.secondary`) remain valid in the new type. No code modification required.

1. **Removed `EmptyStateHeader` wrapper** (lines 30–34): Moved its props (`headingLevel="h4"`, `icon`, `titleText`) directly onto the `<EmptyState>` component.
2. **Removed `EmptyStateIcon` wrapper**: Changed `icon={<EmptyStateIcon icon={VirtualMachineIcon} />}` to `icon={VirtualMachineIcon}` (v6 `EmptyState` takes the icon component directly, not wrapped in `EmptyStateIcon`).
3. **Cleaned up imports**: Removed `EmptyStateHeader` and `EmptyStateIcon` from the `@patternfly/react-core` import block since they are no longer referenced.

### Fix 2
Lines: 38, 46, 51
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>

  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: react-i18next
  parentName: Trans

Prop: icon

Component <EmptyState> has a new prop `titleText` (type: `React.ReactNode`) added in v6 that accepts JSX content.

This prop may be intended to receive content that was previously passed as children. Review the JSX children of <EmptyState> and determine if any should be moved to the `titleText` prop.

Example migration:
  Before: <EmptyState>{content} other children</EmptyState>
  After:  <EmptyState titleText=>other children</EmptyState>

Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>
